name: Ironhide Brute
description: A hulking predator with iron-tough hide, known for charging through barriers and overwhelming prey with raw force.
lore: Ironhide Brutes roam the broken badlands and deep forests of the Prime. Hunters who survive an encounter describe the sound of cracking earth beneath their charge — and the silence after.
feature_effect: Charge up to your full movement speed in a straight line. Each creature in its path must succeed on a Physical check or be knocked Prone and take [[1+@{PL}]] Physical damage.

features.name: Ironhide
features.effect: Has additional [[5 * @{PL}]] armor

name: Gloomwing Siren
description: A feathered creature with iridescent wings and a haunting call. It lures travelers off paths and into hazardous terrain.
lore: Gloomwings nest in old-growth canopies and sing to confuse wayfarers. Fey scholars believe their call is an evolved mimicry of distress signals from wounded prey.
feature_effect: One creature within short range that can hear the Gloomwing must succeed on a Spirit check or be Charmed until the end of their next turn. While Charmed, they must move toward the Gloomwing on their turn.
feature_duration: Until end of their next turn

name: Ashveil Rot
description: A shambling mass of decayed matter held together by necrotic energy. It spreads a choking ash-cloud wherever it walks.
lore: Ashveils are born from mass graves left untended during Eclipse bleeds. They don't hunger for flesh — they spread rot as a reflex, a kind of contagion given legs.
feature_effect: The Ashveil releases a burst of choking ash in a short radius. Creatures in range must succeed on a Survival check or gain the Coughing condition until the end of their next turn.
feature_duration: Until end of their next turn

effects.effect: Choose a target within short range. They must succeed on a Survival check or become Sickened. While Sickened, the target has the Coughing, Confused, and Exhausted conditions. Each successful Survival check removes one condition of their choice. The sickness remains until all the conditions are cleared

Choose a reach range area within short range. Each creature in the area makes a Survival check. On a failure, the creature becomes Plagued and immediately gains the Coughing, Confused, Exhausted, Blind, and Stunned conditions. On each of their turns, a Plagued creature may make a Survival check, removing one condition of their choice on a success. Plagued ends only when all five conditions have been cleared. While any conditions remain, if a Plagued creature moves within reach range of any living creature, that creature must make a Survival check or become Plagued under the same rules.

name: Booy
feature_effect: be hurppin

name: Skeleton
environment: Prime, Fey, Dreamsea, Void, Ordealis, Eclipse
lore: Most creatures have bones, and many powerful mages and magical effects can cause skeletons to return and serve a great power.
feature_effect: If brought to 0 wounds, make a Physical check. Per success gain [PL] healing, on a failure the undead is destroyed.

name: Ice Elemental
feature_effect: When struck with a physical melee attack, deal [PL] piercing damage to the melee attacker

features.name: Encase
features.effect: As an action make a contested physical check with a creature you touch. if the creature fails they are encased inside your ice and take [[1d6]] ice damage at the start of each of your turns and they are constrained and pinned. On their turn they can attempt to escape as a half-action

name: Crystal Psion
feature_effect: When you take Solar damage, deal half damage to all creatures within reach range

features.name: Solar Siphon
features.effect: When you take solar damage, gain half as much as armor

name: Child of Vassago
feature_effect: At the start of its turn, you gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls you make during that turn, but attack rolls against you have advantage until the end of your next turn.
feature_duration: Until end of your next turn

features.name: Charge
features.effect: When you move at least 15 ft on your turn, gain +5 damage on your next attack check on that turn.

features.name: Recall Heliron
features.effect: Recall a thrown Heliron weapon within short range as a Threat point. Doing so causes the creature to be pulled 10ft to you, and take [PL] slashing damage as it is torn from the flesh of the target

name: Red Lizard
feature_effect: Immune to fire damage

features.name: Magma Queen
features.effect: The queen twirls in her bath of flames, all creatures within short range take [[3d6]] fire damage or half per success on an agility check

name: Berserker
feature_effect: deal an additional 1d6 melee damage

features.name: Fury
features.effect: While at half or less wounds deal double damage

name: Were Cursed
description: A powerful creature changed by a curse to resemble that of a predatory beast
feature_effect: As an action, leap at a creature within short range, they must make a Physical check and take [[2d6]] impact damage, reducing by half per success

features.name: Mundane Protection
features.effect: Damage from non-nature origin or silvered weapons deals half damage.

features.name: Observant
features.effect: You have advantage on Mental checks to perceive creatures within short range

features.name: Pack Hunter
features.effect: Gain +1 to checks and damage per ally within reach range

features.name: Howl of Terror
features.effect: You let out a fearsome howl, all creatures within short range must make a Mental check or take the fear condition. The next time they heal the howl they do so at advantage. After they succeed on the howl they are immune to the howl

features.name: Silver Vulnerability
features.effect: Take double damage from silvered weapons.

name: Ferrus Moncher
feature_effect: Has additional [[5 * @{PL}]] armor

features.name: Metal Hound
features.effect: Deals double damage to armor or metal

features.name: Spell Reflect
features.effect: Can make a physical check to reduce the damage by half on spells.

features.name: Swarm Mother (PL 10)
features.effect: summon a PL3 [Ferrus Moncher Larva] swarm

name: Spider
feature_effect: As an action spit a web at a creature within short range to pin them until the end of their next turn. This web can be broken with a physical check as an Off-Action
feature_duration: Until end of their next turn

features.name: Summon Spiderlings (PL 10)
features.effect: summon [[1d4]] PL3 [Spiderlings]

name: Eye Knobbler
description: Engages in cryptic talk, potentially distracting or misleading opponents
lore: They have various magical and non-magical eyes in its collection, each with different abilities or effects
feature_effect: Choose a creature to make an Observation check, On a failure, the target loses an eye and gains Confused permanently. A second success leaves them Blind permanently. Lost eyes can be reattached or replaced with another creature's eye if treated within 24 hours.

features.name: The Collector
features.effect: After each long rest, if any creature within the region is missing an eye taken by this monster, the GM rolls a Luck check. On a failure, another creature in the party wakes without an eye. No sound, no struggle, no memory. A trail of faint tracks and the smell of something wet leads away from camp.

features.name: Shadow Slip
features.effect: As an action moves quickly to a new location within medium range without provoking opportunity attacks, teleporting through shadows

features.name: Glimmering Gaze
features.effect: target a creature, they must make an Observation check or take the blind condition until the end of their next turn

name: Beetle Guardian
feature_effect: Has additional [[5 * @{PL}]] armor

features.name: Luminescent Eyes
features.effect: As an action, the beetle guardian make a check to see invisible creatures within short range not behind cover

features.name: Charge
features.effect: As an action charge your full movement in a line, all enemies within that line are knocked prone on a failed Agility check

name: Wisp
feature_effect: As an action gain the intangible condition or remove it

features.name: Roots of Protection
features.effect: Summons a tangle of ethereal roots in a reach-range area within short range. Each enemy in the area must succeed on a Physical check or be Pinned until the end of your next turn.

name: Clown
feature_effect: The clown conjures a PL 3 illusion of itself within short range for up to 1 minute. While active, the clown occupies both locations simultaneously. Both bodies draw from a shared PL 3 health pool. When that pool reaches zero, the illusion collapses and the clown returns to a single location with whatever health remains.

features.name: Manic Laughter
features.effect: As an Action, The clown lets out a chilling, hysterical laugh. All enemies within Short range must succeed on a Spirit check or be inflicted with Confusion until the end of their next turn.
features.duration: Until end of their next turn

features.name: Unsettling
features.effect: the clown contorts their body in unnatural ways, attacks against the clown have -2 to hit

features.name: Madness
features.effect: As an Action, the clown makes a mental check at a target within short range, on a success causes Fear

name: Treant
feature_effect: Deal double damage to vehicles and structures

features.name: Summon Rootlings
features.effect: As an Action, Summon [[1d4]] PL3 [Rootlings] within reach that remain for 1 minute. MAX Rootlings: 6

features.name: Animate Tree (PL14)
features.effect: As an Action once per day, Target a tree within short range. The tree becomes a PL6 [Awakened Tree] minion for 1 minute

features.name: Verdant Veil
features.effect: While in a natural environment or within reach range of plant life, this creature is treated as invisible. This effect ends immediately if the creature attacks or is touched by another creature. It resumes at the start of this creature's next turn if the conditions are still met.

features.name: Root Grasp
features.effect: While in nature or on dirt, as an Action target a creature within short ranger and make a physical check as roots grasp at the target. On a success cause the Pinned condition until the end of your next turn
features.duration: Until end of your next turn

features.name: Entomb
features.effect: While in nature or on dirt as an action, touch a creature and make a Physical check. On a success, roots and soil surge up around them, leaving the target Pinned and Constrained until the end of your next turn.
features.duration: Until end of your next turn

name: Rootlings
feature_effect: While in a natural environment or within reach range of plant life, this creature is treated as invisible. This effect ends immediately if the creature attacks or is touched by another creature. It resumes at the start of this creature's next turn if the conditions are still met.

features.name: Root
features.effect: While in nature or on dirt, as an Action touch a creature and make a physical check. On a success cause the Pinned condition

name: Awakened Tree
feature_effect: While in a natural environment or within reach range of plant life, this creature is treated as invisible. This effect ends immediately if the creature attacks or is touched by another creature. It resumes at the start of this creature's next turn if the conditions are still met.

features.name: Entomb
features.effect: While in nature or on dirt, as an Action touch a creature and make a Physical check. On a success cause the Pinned and Constrained conditions until the end of your next turn

name: Rot Hag
feature_effect: As an Action touch a creature and make a Mental check. On a success cause the Pinned condition

features.name: Mimicry
features.effect: The hag can mimic the natural sounds of living creatures

features.name: False Look
features.effect: Hidden behind an illusion usually of a beautiful woman. Mental checks to perceive reveal the falseness of the illusion.

features.name: Bog Bubble
features.effect: As an action blends into natural environments or dark shadows.
features.duration: Until end of your next turn

effects.effect: Reveal a hidden object, creature, or illusion within short range per success. If none are found, this spell costs 0 MN.
Focus on a creature to sense its motivation, emotional state, or weaknesses.
Observe a familiar distant location, object, or creature for up to 1 minute.
Nullify a minor magical effect within short range, such as a weak illusion or simple ward, in a reach-range area. You can pool Mana with other casters to dispel stronger magic.

Nullify magical effects within short range cast by a mage, divine creature, or magical monster, in a short-range area. If the effect is powerful, the nullification may last only until the end of your next turn.

Interrupt the function of magical constructs, undead, or elementals under the control of a mage—either permanently or until the end of your next turn. If it is a minion of a powerful creature, the dispel may prevent further commands, allowing the minion to escape or fight back if it chooses.
Release a bolt of lightning that hits a target within short range dealing 4 lightning damage, and dealing half that damage to another target within reach range

Choose a metal object within short range to imbue with lightning. When any creature enters the melee range or touches the trap, it discharges, dealing 4d6 lightning damage and they must make a Survival check or take the Stunned condition until the end of their next turn. The trap remains active for 1 hour or until triggered.

Summon a localized lightning storm in a medium range area that pulses of static and roaring thunder. All creatures take 9d6 lightning damage and must make a Survival check to halve the damage per success unless the target is wet or in water

Choose a target within short range. They must succeed on a Survival check or become Sickened. While Sickened, the target has the Coughing, Confused, and Exhausted conditions. Each successful Survival check removes one condition of their choice. The sickness remains until all the conditions are cleared

Choose a reach range area within short range. Each creature in the area makes a Survival check. On a failure, the creature becomes Plagued and immediately gains the Coughing, Confused, Exhausted, Blind, and Stunned conditions. On each of their turns, a Plagued creature may make a Survival check, removing one condition of their choice on a success. Plagued ends only when all five conditions have been cleared. While any conditions remain, if a Plagued creature moves within reach range of any living creature, that creature must make a Survival check or become Plagued under the same rules.

name: Dryad
feature_effect: As an Action, walk into a solid tree and appear in another tree within short range

features.name: Dryad Charm
features.effect: Target one creature within short range that can see you. The target makes a Spirit check. On a failure, it becomes Charmed for 24 hours or until harmed by you or your allies. While charmed, the creature treats you as a trusted friend and tries to act in your favor but is not directly controlled. When the effect ends, the creature remembers the experience but not the magic. You can charm only 1 humanoid and up to 3 beasts at a time.

effects.effect: Negate the next spell cast within short range until the end of your next turn. If no spell is cast, regain half the Mana spent.
Silently negate the next spell cast within medium range until the end of your next turn. If no spell is cast, regain half the Mana spent.
Touch a creature and reduce the severity of a curse by 1 step.
Target a creature and remove a disease.
Touch an item and double its size for 1 minute. The item will grow but will not exceed the size of the area it's in or cause damage to creatures nearby.

Touch a willing creature and double its size for 1 minute. The creature will grow but will not exceed the size of the area it's in or cause damage to creatures nearby. The grown creature has advantage on Strength checks but gains the Confused condition.

name: oOzestrOsity
feature_effect: All attacks deal an additional 2d6 damage

features.name: Fluid Weakness
features.effect: Takes double damage from Fluid damage

features.name: Engulf
features.effect: Engulf a creature within melee range, forcing it to make a Physical check. On failure, the target takes [[3d6]] acid damage and is Pinned and Constrained inside the ooze taking damage again at the start of their next turn

features.name: oOzeling
features.effect: As an Action, deal [[2d6 ]]damage to self and Summon [[1d4]] PL3 [oOzeling]

features.name: Split
features.effect: As an action, split into 2 identical copies with half your current health each.

name: Marksmen
feature_effect: As an Action, fire the sniper rifle with a Mental Check, dealing [[3d4!]] per success

features.name: Perch
features.effect: When you do not move on your turn, your attacks have advantage until the end of your next turn
features.duration: Until end of their next turn

features.name: Disarming Shot
features.effect: When you hit with an attack, you can choose to forgo the damage and disarm the target instead

name: Veteran
feature_effect: As an Off Action, When hit by a melee attack, make a contested Physical check. On success, reduce the damage by [[@{PL}]].

features.name: Focus Fire
features.effect: When an ally hits a creature, gain +2 on your next attack check against that same creature.

features.name: Rally
features.effect: As an Action, remove a corpus condition from an ally within reach

name: oOzeling
feature_effect: As an action, split into 2 identical copies with half your current health each.

name: Demon (Humanoid)
motivation: Seeking to cause pain in others
feature_effect: As an Action, your claws glow with hate and darkness. Make a melee strike against a target within melee and deal [[6d6]] Vozian damage, and half as much to you

features.name: Dark Cure
features.effect: As an Action, remove a corpus condition and take the pinned condition

features.name: Demonic Command
features.effect: As an Action, Commands lesser demons or loyal humans

effects.effect: One creature within short range must make a Spirit check or gain the Fear condition. On a success they are immune to the Fear condition from spells for 24 hours

Flood a creature's mind with overwhelming dread. They must make a Spirit check or take [[1d6]] psychic damage and gain the Fear condition. On a success they are immune to the Fear condition from spells for 24 hours.
Draw a thin line of blood from you to a creature within reach range. They must make a Physical check or take 2 damage that ignores armor and you heal for 1 healing

You seize control of the blood of one creature within short range, wrenching their body like a puppet. The target must make a Survival check or become Pinned and Constrained until the end of their next turn. You can use your Off-Action to force them to take a movement or non-magical action of your choice. Creatures with no blood are immune.

name: Vampire (Avuţie)
lore: Vampires started in the Kingslands, 3 powerful tribes formed from undead lords of necromantic magic. Powerful as it made them they were cursed by the sun.
feature_effect: While in sunlight you have the Exhausted condition and take [[1]] solar damage every round. As an off-action, heal for [[@{pl}]] if you have no major conditions

features.name: Invitation (Avuţie)
features.effect: You cannot enter an enclosed space owned or claimed by a creature without verbal consent

features.name: Pierced Heart
features.effect: When you take piercing damage, take an additional +3 damage

features.name: Vampire Kiss (Avuţie)
features.effect: Deal [[PL]] piercing damage. The target must make a Survival check or contract the Vampire Disease. While infected they have the Coughing condition. At the next Press On or Long Rest they make another Survival check, on a failure they gain the Charmed and Slowed conditions. At the following Press On or Long Rest they make a final Survival check, on a failure they remove all previous conditions and permanently gain the Undying Disease and features of the Avuție.

effects.effect: One creature within short range must make a Spirit check or gain the Fear condition. On a success they are immune to the Fear condition from spells for 24 hours

Flood a creature's mind with overwhelming dread. They must make a Spirit check or take [[1d6]] psychic damage and gain the Fear condition. On a success they are immune to the Fear condition from spells for 24 hours.

You seize control of the blood of one creature within short range, wrenching their body like a puppet. The target must make a Survival check or become Pinned and Constrained until the end of their next turn. You can use your Off-Action to force them to take a movement or non-magical action of your choice. Creatures with no blood are immune.

feature_effect: While in sunlight you have the Exhausted condition and take [[1]] solar damage every round. As an off-action, heal for [[@{pl}]] if you have no major conditions

features.name: Invitation
features.effect: You cannot enter an enclosed space owned or claimed by a creature without verbal consent

features.name: Pierced Heart
features.effect: When you take piercing damage, take an additional +3 damage

features.name: Vampire Bite
features.effect: Deal [[PL]] piercing damage. The target must make a Survival check or contract the Vampire Disease. While infected they have the Coughing condition. At the next Press On or Long Rest they make another Survival check, on a failure they gain the Slowed and Exhausted conditions. At the following Press On or Long Rest they make a final Survival check, on a failure they remove all previous conditions and contract the Undying Disease permanently

Flood a creature's mind with overwhelming dread. They must make a Spirit check or take [[1d6]] psychic damage and gain the Fear condition. On a success they are immune to the Fear condition from spells for 24 hours.

name: Vampire (Tărie)
lore: Vampires started in the Kingslands, 3 powerful tribes formed from undead lords of necromantic magic. Powerful as it made them they were cursed by the sun.
feature_effect: While in sunlight you have the Exhausted condition and take [[1]] solar damage every round. As an off-action, heal for [[@{pl}]] if you have no major conditions

features.name: Invitation (Tărie)
features.effect: You cannot enter a territory claimed by another without dominance combat

features.name: Running Water
features.effect: When you take fluid damage, take an additional +3 damage

features.name: Vampire Claw (Tărie)
features.effect: Deal [[PL]] slashing damage. The target must make a Survival check or contract the Vampire Disease. While infected they have the Bleeding condition. At the next Press On or Long Rest they make another Survival check, on a failure they gain the Exhausted and Weakened conditions. At the following Press On or Long Rest they make a final Survival check, on a failure they remove all previous conditions and permanently gain the Undying Disease and features of the Tărie.
